name: 14"x72" Reversible Menorah Table Runner - Spritz™
description:
Add a festive touch to your table with the 14"x 72" reversible Menorah table runner from Spritz™. One side features a playful menorah pattern while the other offers a simple solid for everyday use. It's a quick way to bring a bit of holiday cheer to your dining setup without overthinking it. Just lay it down, set your dishes and you're good to go.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
